title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues that inventing theories like General Relativity represents the ultimate test for AI systems. The framing positions scientific discovery and fundamental physics breakthroughs as a measure of AI progress beyond narrow benchmarks.
